tasks.subject: [relay-adapter-streaming-fixes] [P3] Add streaming boolean to SlackAdapterConfig schema
tasks.description:
Add a `streaming` field to the Slack adapter config schema so users can toggle between live-editing streaming mode (default: true) and single-message buffered mode.

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/shared/src/relay-adapter-schemas.ts`

Update `SlackAdapterConfigSchema` (lines 81-88) to include the `streaming` field:

```typescript
export const SlackAdapterConfigSchema = z
  .object({
    botToken: z.string().min(1),
    appToken: z.string().min(1),
    signingSecret: z.string().min(1),
    streaming: z.boolean().default(true),
  })
  .openapi('SlackAdapterConfig');
```

This adds `streaming` as an optional boolean field defaulting to `true`, ensuring backward compatibility -- existing configs without `streaming` continue to stream by default.

The `SlackAdapterConfig` type is automatically inferred from the schema, so no separate type update is needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `SlackAdapterConfigSchema` includes `streaming: z.boolean().default(true)`
- The inferred `SlackAdapterConfig` type includes `streaming: boolean`
- Existing configs without `streaming` field parse successfully and default to `true`
- Type-checking passes across all packages that import `SlackAdapterConfig`
tasks.activeForm: Adding streaming boolean to SlackAdapterConfig schema

tasks.subject: [relay-adapter-streaming-fixes] [P3] Add streaming configField to Slack adapter manifest
tasks.description:
Add the `streaming` toggle to the Slack adapter's manifest `configFields` so users can configure it via the relay panel UI.

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/relay/src/adapters/slack/slack-adapter.ts`

Add a new entry to the `configFields` array in `SLACK_MANIFEST` (after the `signingSecret` field, around line 143):

```typescript
configFields: [
  // ... existing botToken, appToken, signingSecret fields ...
  {
    key: 'streaming',
    label: 'Stream Responses',
    type: 'boolean',
    required: false,
    description: 'Show responses as they arrive (live editing). Disable to send a single message when complete.',
    visibleByDefault: true,
    helpMarkdown: 'When enabled, agent responses appear token-by-token in Slack via message editing. When disabled, the full response is sent as a single message after the agent finishes.',
  },
],
```

The `visibleByDefault: true` ensures this toggle is shown in the adapter configuration form without requiring the user to expand an advanced section.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The Slack adapter manifest includes a `streaming` configField of type `boolean`
- The field has a clear description and helpMarkdown explaining both modes
- The field is not marked as required (defaults handled by schema)
- The field is visible by default in the setup form
tasks.activeForm: Adding streaming configField to Slack adapter manifest
